name: Elemental Arts
description: Direct manipulation of heat, cold, electricity, pressure, or other battlefield forces.

name: Medical Arts
description: Stabilization, healing support, diagnostics, and biological intervention through Arts practice.

name: Defensive Arts
description: Barriers, reinforcement, damage reduction, and survival techniques for prolonged combat.

name: Control Arts
description: Movement denial, terrain shaping, binding, slowing, and tactical interruption.

name: Enhancement Arts
description: Temporary physical amplification, weapon reinforcement, and close-combat support.

name: Perception Arts
description: Sensing, tracking, prediction, communication, and information-focused techniques.

name: Illusion Arts
description: Misdirection, sensory distortion, intimidation, and emotional pressure.

name: Engineering Arts
description: Arts-assisted devices, drones, constructs, traps, and Originium-powered field tools.

name: No Formal Arts
description: The operator does not rely on Originium Arts as a primary combat method.
